name: Bán hàng
description: Đăng bán / đẩy đơn sản phẩm
imageBody:
Design a professional 1:1 social media banner for {{brand}} about "{{title}}".

STYLE
- Clean e-commerce look, soft studio lighting, subtle gradient background.
- Modern, premium and clean, with generous white space.
- Brand colors: {{brandColors}}. Use them for accents, shapes and the CTA button.

LOGO
- Use the provided reference logo image exactly as-is. Do not redraw, recolor, crop or distort it.
- Place it in the top-left corner at a readable size.

MAIN VISUAL
- Hero shot of the product on a clean surface at a slight angle, crisp reflections, one clear focal point.
- Natural lighting, ultra realistic, premium marketing quality, 4K.
- Extra art direction: {{imagePrompt}}

TEXT ON IMAGE — Vietnamese, rendered sharply with correct diacritics
- Headline: "{{bannerHeadline}}"
- Subheadline: "{{bannerSubheadline}}"
- CTA button: "{{bannerCta}}"
- Bottom contact strip: {{contact}}

LAYOUT
- Clear visual hierarchy, balanced composition, rounded corners, soft shadows.
- Readable on both mobile and desktop.

CONSTRAINTS
- Do not invent or alter the logo, hotline or website.
- No watermark, no lorem ipsum, no spelling mistakes.
